title: Pātāla Loka: The Dark Realms Below Earth in Hindu Cosmology
hook: Beneath the soil we walk on, ancient Hindu texts describe not just rock and earth, but seven distinct, vibrant, and chilling worlds, forever veiled from the sun's light.
